MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th April, 2016 G.S.R. 464(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred to by section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, in Schedule I, against serial number 5, in column 3, for item (1) and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “G) Districts of Mumbai, Thane, Palghar, Raigad, Pune, Nasik, Ahmednagar, Satara, Ratnagiri, Sindhudurg, Kollahpur, Sangli, Solapur, Dhule, Nandurbar, Aurangabad and Beed of Maharashtra.”’. [No. 2015/TC (RCT)/1-3] RAVINESH KUMAR, Executive Director (Public Grievances) EXPLANATORY MEMORANDUM Consequent to formation of two new Districts viz. Palghar and Nandurbar, vide notifications of the Government of the State of Maharashtra, number Pra/Phe.B.1108/C.R.167/Thane/M-10, dated the 17th June, 2014 and number REN. 3197/R-74/M-10, dated the 30th June, 1998 respectively, it has become imperative to include these two Districts in the jurisdiction of Mumbai Bench of Railway Claims Tribunal. Hence the rules are being amended. Note :- The principal rules were published vide notification number G.S.R. 842(E), dated the 19th September, 1989 and subsequently amended vide numbers G.S.R 700 (E), dated the 26" November, 1991, G.S.R. 438 (EB), dated the 21st April, 1992, G.S.R. 509 (E), dated the 15th June, 1994, G.S.R. 270 (E), dated the 4th July, 1996, G.S.R. 59(E), dated the 4th February, 1997, G.S.R. 719(E), dated the 15th October, 1999, G.S.R. 167(E), dated the 29th February, 2000, G.S.R. 513(E), dated the 9th July, 2001, G.S.R. 787(E), dated the 2nd December, 2002, G.S.R. 384(E), dated the 22nd October, 2003, G.S.R. 66(E), dated the 15th February, 2006, G.S.R. 498(E), dated the 23rd August, 2006, G.S.R. 96(E), dated the 22nd February, 2010 and G.S.R. (E), dated the 17th September, 2015.
